meaning: adj.不顾的,不考虑的,无关的
examples: Everyone is treated equally, irrespective of race.
The weekly rent is the same irrespective of whether there are three or four occupants.
Irrespective of the quality of a school a child's home life is of key importance.
"I take the ultimate responsibility for what goes on, irrespective of what that is, " said Ashton.
The award is open to all authors of non-fiction books in the UK, irrespective of nationality.
